sourceTitle: Use of Generative AI Tools in Assessment: Guidance for ANU Law Students
evidenceSnippetOriginal: In any piece of submitted work where you have used AI tools, you must explicitly declare: The name(s) of the application(s) used, The purpose for their use, The extent and frequency of their use. This declaration should be included in the first footnote.
